summary: Comprehensive testing of Locofast v2.0 features completed. All requested features verified working: 1) Enquiry source field captured from different forms (RFQ, Contact, Supplier Signup, Fabric Detail) and displayed in admin panel with colored badges, 2) Order type (Sample/Bulk) shown with distinct badges in admin orders panel, 3) Cloudinary signature endpoint working correctly for secure image uploads.
passed_tests: GET /api/enquiries - Admin can view enquiries with source field (200)
GET /api/orders - Orders list includes order_type in items (200)
GET /api/cloudinary/signature - Returns valid signature, timestamp, cloud_name, api_key, folder (200)
GET /api/cloudinary/config - Returns Cloudinary config with enabled=true (200)
Admin Enquiries Page - Source column visible with badges (Supplier Signup, RFQ, website)
Admin Orders Page - Type column visible with SAMPLE/BULK badges
critical_code_review_comments: Enquiry source field properly implemented in backend model (line 277 server.py) and stored in database
AdminEnquiries.js (lines 124-151) correctly displays source badges with appropriate colors for different source types
AdminOrders.js (lines 216-231) correctly derives order_type from items and displays SAMPLE/BULK badges
Cloudinary router properly initializes with credentials from env and generates secure signatures
uploadToCloudinary function in api.js correctly handles signed uploads to Cloudinary cloud
seed_data_creation: Created test enquiries with different source values during testing (cleaned up after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v2.0 features tested and working: 1) Enquiry source field captured from different forms and displayed with colored badges in admin panel, 2) Order type badges (SAMPLE/BULK) working in admin orders page, 3) Cloudinary integration fully functional with signed uploads. Cloud name is 'dqmk2qiy'. No mocked APIs.

enquiry_source_field.admin_display: Source column with colored badges - Purple for Supplier Signup, Blue for RFQ, Gray for Contact, Green for Fabric Page
enquiry_source_field.backend_field: source field in EnquiryCreate model (line 277 server.py)
